reviews_data.review_text: We always stop at Panera when we are in the area. Shout out to Douglas who surprised my husband with a birthday treat,so sweet of you.

We used to order the smokehouse sandwich all the time but this time the meat was very slim and had no onions. The amount of money they charge for their food they could at least make it right. This used to be my son's favorite sandwich and he even let me know not to go back.
Food is fresh and Ontime.

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Paid street parking, Valet

reviews_data.review_text:
I had an overall good experience at this Panera Bread location in Kingsley Town Center. The staff was friendly, the restaurant was clean, and my food came out fresh and exactly as ordered.

The only downside is that the location itself is a bit hard to find, especially if you’re not familiar with the area. Navigating the parking lot can also be a little confusing at first. Once you figure it out, though, it’s definitely worth the visit.

Overall, a solid experience, and I would come back again.
Great location. Quick service. Clean dining area. Very modern.

Came to study, got pick 2 menu.  Often do that at Paneras. This location is new to me, but I will be back, as we moved closeby. Enjoyed my food and time here.
Amanda is awesome!!!!! So pleasant, friendly,  fast, caring.  She was at the register and cleaning and greeting and saying byes to people and giving helful hints (like warm up sweet treat in microwave, showed were it was, and helped). Thank you,  Amanda,  you made my afternoon))))

We have enjoyed Panera for years. This visit was horrible!! On a Friday evening in Kingsley,7:30pm, the drink station was already torn down for cleaning! Then the French onion soup was cold. When it was taken back, the kid in the kitchen told us that there was a microwave out on the floor!! What?!? We go out to eat and get told to warm up our own food that was supposed to come out hot!?! I then took it to the front counter and said it was unacceptable and they said they’d make it right, and again it came out cold!! Unacceptable!! FINALLY on the 3rd try they finally got it hot! But by the time we got the soup hot, our hot sandwiches were cold!!! The worst experience ever at a Panera!! Do better next time!! Although it will have to be with someone else. I won’t be coming back to this location to “use the microwave out on the floor” myself!!

reviews_data.review_text:
Food was nothing special. My husband always says there isn’t enough meat on his sandwich. We stopped by after a basketball game and it was $40 for 3 of us. My bagel was good and fresh, but nothing special.
The seating was horrible.. there were 2 areas of seating where there were a lot of people taking up space that resulted in less seating for anyone who was there with more than 2 people.
This place is amazing! Phoenix is always so sweet and helpful. Amanda is also super fantastical! They have a great team running things as they always do such a great job all around!
Hummmm

The full size soups got 1/2 bowl . I asked her to add bit more soups she said now .
Thsi place can benefit from more cleaning zzz that carpet stinks

Normally I have no issues with Panera, but I was disappointed  this time. I ordered the pick 2; mac and cheese and the French ciabatta dipper. I've attached a pic of my sandwich. There was barely anything on it.  And the au jus was French onion soup, so that sucked. It was pretty much having a cup of French onion soup and dipping only bread in it. Hopefully things will be better next time. Definitely wasn't worth almost $16.00.

The way the package the bagels and pastry is simply gross. They stick in coupons and receipts in the bag. Customer service in drive through is lacking. They never know which bag belongs to who. It’s simply a disaster and I was a Panera lover but they have simply made me never want to go there.

I’d like to give a special shout out to Amanda who took excellent care of me this morning. She was polite, kind, warm, and charming. She had fresh coffee brewed and it was hot, everything was stocked and the bakery was full and plentiful. I hope she is truly appreciated as she is a hidden gem and you don’t find people like her often. Some Paneras I’ve been to with kiosk, you don’t get greeted or acknowledged and it’s not a good feeling when you go into a place to spend money. At this Panera, Ms. Amanda is the best and we had a lovely chat and she really brightened my day, &  made my morning 5x better.

Used the app for a Rapid Pick-Up and my order was ready exactly when it said it would be. Everything was packaged correctly and the food was fresh. Definitely my go-to Panera in the area for a quick, hassle-free lunch.

Ordered on kiosk and was told on the pick two could not take to the onions off so want me to pay like 14 bucks in think instead of 7 over onions like no reason why can't take something off I won't go back to this location other stores don't give me issues like really did not add or change anything then I could see ordering the higher price one maybe someone needs to contact a lawyer to find a change
I was just in for a pick up order but they made sure my food was ready and told me where to find everything that I needed. The staff was very friendly and polite.
Rotten food served. Just opened this up at my office. Gross.
Always great food and smiling faces!
Carmen and Erika were so rude to me when I asked for my sandwich to be fixed. They had so much attitude and I will not be coming back

I am pasting the same picture from another review because I had an issue with these same individuals. Erika yelled at me and bucked for asking for napkins - completely unprofessional and unwarranted. Who hires these types of people and keeps them employed when they are clearly ruining the entire establishment and making it an unsafe environment for everyone around. There are already accusations of racism and aggression from so many others. Carmen as well is beyond uncivil insolent. They have no home-training and are offensive to customers. This panera and it's manager are not doing their job and need to be placed elsewhere

Carmen and Erika are extremely combative and rude. Beware of these individuals making your food. My sandwich was made wrong so I kindly asked if I could get it remedied and was immediately met with a bad attitude and defensiveness from Cameron. Then Erika chimed in and was rudely told me i was wrong and they were right. I felt bullied and dogpiled on for no reason. I finally got it remade but couldnt even trust that they didnt do anything to my food, so ive also wasted money on an establishment that mistreats their customers. I've noticed them be rude to other customers in the past and now I know that this is their regular customer service. No accountability or simple empathy from these two. It is just food, mistakes happen and I understand that employees go through so many things - I am in food service myself. That's why I remained kind, but these two are not qualified to serve the public and handle anything that people are going to ingest. Management is not doing their job by keeping these two around, especially after so many complaints against Erika.
My sandwich had 3 slices of turkey, 2 slices of bacon, and half a a slice of cheese spread across a whole sandwich. Terrible, not worth the money. Soup was good
Always a great place to be for good nutrition, business and smiles
I ordered a sandwich that looked like it was going to be stuffed with meat.This is what I ended up with
I come in if want to got alot ppl boy call me on private number again watch witch car you drive dont know me at all boy

I like this place for being clean cosy and having great coffee and nice people working there. My kids love it for cookies and muffins.
We've been in this location so many times and it has been consistently awesome. Everything is just perfect.

Very rude manager! Argued with me about the order my 85 year old father made. They charged he and my mother over $45 for lunch and then questioned me as to why i didn’t say something! I was saying something! I was so disrespected that I told her Nevermind and went back to our table. She never came over to make restitution ! Poor customer service! Not to mention food on the floors and tabletops no cleaned off. Just really disappointed!

My daughter and I ordered lunch through the drive-through during a busy, frantic week and Amanda treated us so well. I have never had better customer service—she sincerely asked about our day, was genuinely friendly, and threw in an extra treat that had broken and was no longer sellable. Our encounter with her was such a bright spot and pick-me-up in our day and made us want to return.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating

reviews_data.review_text: We visited this location recently. We were served by Amanda. She was so pleasant and helpful, I felt compelled to leave her some kudos here!

Arrived around 11:30 and ordered a drink just for the man at the pickup window to hand me someone else’s drink. The drink was ordered over an hour before I arrived and was watered down from the ice melting. Extremely disappointed at the laziness shown by the worker!

I ordered a sandwich for rapid pickup through the app. I realized i forgot to take onions and tomatoes off, and couldn’t edit my order as i had already placed it. I called the store and asked if they could modify it for me and they did! Even though they were pretty busy. Incredible service. Thanks Panera staff at Kingsley!

Poor portion size of Mac N’ Cheese. Didn’t know that there is now an option to pick between a cup or bowl size. When my food was done, I looked down at the Mac n’ cheese and was disappointed by the portion. Went back up to the counter and explained my disappointment, the staff members didn’t say anything. Just looked at me like I was stupid. Will not be returning.

Where can I start!  Wow Riley was so amazing I asked for a light roast and well they were out!  She went out of her way to Brew it for me!  She was absolutely awesome did it with a smile and just made my day because MAN it was gonna be a rough one if I didn’t have it!  So Thank You again Riley for taking care of me and that store!

Another mixed up order yesterday. With the price we spend be more careful. There is zero way to get a credit which isn't cool. The tuna is delicious that's why I keep coming. The sandwich ordered for my son was messed up though which makes me want to stop coming.

Ridiculously rude and unprofessional kitchen help. Nobody acknowledged me and the pick up order sits there away from everyone else’s pick up orders. All orders’ names were called out but that one and after waiting 6-7 minutes finally ask if that’s my order. The lady rudely asks “what’s the name?” And never did this with anyone else’s order that got put on the counter. We will take our business elsewhere.
Have the drink plan it good for a lot of different things also sometimes get a pastry for 2 bucks but price doesn't go down till hit check out I think it should show before then when in the cart

I arrived after driving 12 miles 4 minutes after opening at 7:04 and they were already out of soufflés.  How this place stays In business I will never know. The manager was nice but this place is utterly incompetent. Maybe they should figure out how to actually make food and they will sell more.  Walked out and will never be back.
this is a new Panera, and the design and furnishings are efficient and uninviting. I don't like sitting in a chair where my feet dangle. or sitting at a long bank of tables. uninviting
Had a nice sandwich and salad. Expensive when you consider you order at a counter, pick up your food at a window and required to put your plates away. But they still ask for a tip when ordering.

review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Dietary restrictions, Parking, Kid-friendliness

reviews_data.review_text: My favorite place to bring kids here.

My order has been wrong EVERY SINGLE TIME!! This time there wasn’t a pickle. Through the drive thru I explained that an item is always missing from my orders and asked if they had included a pickle. Her response: “There should be.” So I checked AND there wasn’t. So I requested one and the employee brought me one right away. It WAS SPOILED! Never again. Stay away!  Between the bad attitude and the rotten food, disgusting! You’d do better at Chik-Fil-A up the road!!! I’ll keep my money from now on. Good luck Fort Mill Panera with your current business plan of: Running Customers Away. Please let me know when you reach pandemic levels of business so I can CELEBRATE!!! Good riddance!
Gotta Love some good food! My favorite is the turkey sandwich dipped in some broccoli soup! Yummy for my tummy
Una buena opción para los amantes de los sandwiches, ingredientes y vegetales frescos, ambiente agradable y la atención muy rápido, todo el personal es muy amable.
The food was delicious. I like it because it's natural with no antibiotics!

Food never disappoints, regardless if it’s take out or dine in. While the food is ridiculously priced, it tastes pretty darn good and hits the spot. Location is usually pretty clean and is large with a bunch of seating for everyone. My favorite is the fontega chicken sandwhich. A little bit disappointed that the charged lemonades left the menu.

We stopped for lunch. Two people had the squash soup and said it was excellent. Two had 1/2 sandwiches and Mac and cheese, also good. I had the chili which was notably lacking in flavor and spiciness until I added hot sauce. Then it was spicy enough, but the flavor was still meh.
Nice location with wonderful staff.  Very polite gentleman working at this time at the cashier. Wonderful atmosphere!! I will visit again.
Can’t get a simple order correct and they don’t seem to care.

This is the second time in a month that I've received the half size salad for the full size. Either it's a training thing or a margin thing. But now that this has happened twice, at this price, I will think twice about picking up lunch at Panera.
High price, low value

This location in my opinion has been headed in the wrong direction. Past few meals have not been very good at all. Me and my family went in one time to order and were ignored for 10 minutes so we got the hint and just left.
As a Panara always is.

review_questions.Vegetarian offerings: Large vegetarian selection, Clearly labeled vegetarian dishes

reviews_data.review_text: Always the best  this place kept me alive during the pandemic. During lockdown they came and delivered. Simply the Best Panera.

I ordered dinner for three for delivery yesterday, 6/15/24. When it arrived one of the sandwiches for the order was missing. I called the store directly and the manager on duty, Ted or Teddy (I'm so sorry I don't remember exactly) went way above and beyond to make sure the issue was resolved. He even kept in touch with me the whole time, so I knew how long it would be for the item to arrive. It was so refreshing to feel like someone cared, even though it truly was not a big deal in the grand scheme of things. Thank you so much Ted/Teddy! My family and I greatly appreciate you!!!!
Excellent customer service.  Great coffee.  Wonderful atmosphere and outdoor seating options.

I bought a dozen bagels slice not toasted. When I asked if the lady in the kitchen if I could toasted one of the bagels she said I would have to buy another bagel to get it toasted..... naw already bought a dozen. Sorry if I was asking for a little customer service.
Also when I check my order there were no Plain bagels that I ordered.
Wait time is much longer than it should be
Server forgot our spoons in te drive through but a great experience as always. Good food at panera.

Check your food before you drive away. I had already driven away to my job to eat my lunch there…  turns out the chipotle avocado melt sandwich had rotten avocados…  which is sad because the main ingredient  is avocado. I would've  just taken it off and not complained but I am pregnant . Manager was really kind and refunded me for the sandwhich … but just make sure you check your food before you drive away.
W charged lemonade

Chic noodle soup was delicious.  I had a chic salad sandwich with tomato basil bread. Atmosphere on the quiet side, from what I saw we all were eating more than talking.  The young man that took our order was pleasant and professional.
Who’s here after that worker pulled the fire alarm? Yes, that happened when I went there, it was an accident. Just don’t fire her, it was an accident. The place itself is pretty good
Absolutely love Panera, hooked to their dark roast.

I normally like the quality of the food and the service but there is drastic differents between going inside and going through the drive thru. I went through the drive thru and found that they just threw my bagel into a bag without napkins, and gave me a caramel cafe latte without the caramel.
ordered 2 soups and pieces of bread were included for free and they made me pay extra...not good customer service, very disappointed.
合理化されたチェーン店だけど、お店の人が親切。シナモンクランチのベーグル美味しかった。
I met a friend for dinner, and it is the perfect place to catch up with great food as well. The Autumn squash soup is amazing!

I like/ love Panera for salads, sandwiches, soups, sip club, etc.
I love the Roast Turkey Avocado Club sandwich. Except TODAY.  Instead of wrapping the whole sandwich in a piece of paper large enough to wrap up the whole sandwich, 2 overlapping pieces of paper were used and held together with 1 label. Not knowing how it had been wrapped, upon opening the sandwich, the whole thing fell apart.  Not only was it wrapped improperly, but the sandwich was poorly made.  It is usually made of slices of turkey.  As you can see from the pictures, there were chopped up bits of turkey used.  I suspect these were leftover bits from slicing the breast across the day.  If there was not enough turkey to provide slices, I should have been told, and I could have chosen a different sandwich.  I hope Panera workers are retrained to think of the customers and the practicality of their work.

place is amazing don’t get me wrong. But they have a problem with the amount of bacon they put on there breakfast sandwich. I literally only got two little small pieces of bacon and when i say small i mean small. Not trying to be one of those people but it’s pathetic.
Got some tea not feeling totally 100% love the flavors
Management sucks
The atmosphere here is much more relaxed than other Panera chains I’ve visited. The staff was friendly but our food came out room temperature. Over all a good experience.
Always looks like the bare minimum effort was given in the food I receive. Workers are not customer service oriented. Definitely over priced for what you get.

This location has began removing cups from the self checkout. Thats fine until…cashiers are handing cups to customers with their fingers inside the cups. No one knows where the cashiers hands have been it is disgusting, unsanitary and concerning that management would hire someone that does not know better.

The service and restaurant are nice. Orders are done correctly. My only issue is that this location is constantly out of the free side of bread. I understand they likely run out but it's happened more times than not that it's an inventory issue and their should be an alternative bread option. What is this place without the free bread, just Panera? Lol please resolve that.
Food is great, excellent location and the costumer service was really good 👍🏽 I’ll come back
Tried the Sausage, Scrambled Egg & Cheese on Asiago Bagel, superb. Location was large, modern, and had low prices. Staff were friendly and efficient, everything was perfect. Highly recommend.

I ordered a whole Green Goddess Cobb salad and the bowl wasn’t even filled half way. Majority was lettuce. I asked for light bacon and chicken but guess they thought it meant no chicken at all. For the price you pay it wasn’t worth it.
They have gotten ridiculous with the prices. $45 for 2 people to eat a half salad and half a sandwich.

While at Panera we had a small challenge and my daughter (14) Ordered the wrong item from the menu. When we brought it the attention of the manager, he graciously fix the  order for us. No fault of their own and still made it right! We will be back!
Keep it up
Gave me food poisoning I think
I usually come for the Iced coffee or an oatmeal cookie.
Got food poisoning here yesterday. Don't recommend.
Great coffee
Caleb in the kitchen is amazing and helpful! He toasted out baguettes for our sides and was so friendly!! Great atmosphere and clean!

Absolutely Terrible! I will not go back or recommend this location. Someone had bagel’s delivered to us and most of all our bagels was stale and hard. You could not even bite or cut into the bagels. I called Panera to get this situation handled, I spoke with manager. He did not handle this situation at all. He made the excuse that the bagels are made fresh everyday, the texture is how it suppose to be! I said ok, I hung up the phone because clearly he was not trying to resolve the situation!! To the manager that I spoke with this morning, please listen to your customers and resolve situation especially when customers like me coming to your location and spending their money. 😠

Fast, delicious and good treatment, I went through to the drive window to take the food to my house and cheap. $
Recommended broccoli soup with half a chicken sandwich 😋👍 !!

Rápido,delicioso y buen trato yo fui por la ventanilla para llevar a casa y barato . $
Recomendado sopa de brócoli con una mitad de sándwich de pollo 😋👍 !!
Clean and organized restaurant.

Had a big order for carryout they had a slight mix up and gave me the wrong side item. Returned to get the correct item but had to wait while they looked up my order. Minor inconvenience although I slightly blame myself for not checking because most places now days get stuff wrong or incorrect all the time. I suspect they were out of Mac and cheese at the time and subbed broccoli cheese soup alas that isn't what I wanted. Assumptions aside it's still good although still very overpriced. I give you a 3.5 star but Google don't allow it so accept that 4 star out of slight pitty. I also would have been angrier if it were not purchased with a gift card because it was technically all free. They did however give me two sides of Mac and cheese to replace. Ok NVM you got your half a star. I'll give you 4 stars. Great job tonight. I'm taking a poop as I type this for reference.

I’ve visited Panera at Kingsley this past week during a business conference. I was picking up breakfast food for several people, and I received the rudest customer service I’ve ever gotten in my entire life from an employee at the counter. She was a much older Caucasian lady, who was apparently quite busy, but she was the only one working the counter. She very gruffly asked me to use the kiosk to order, and I complied, but the kiosk would not take my credit card, so I had to come back to her. I’ve never seen someone so aggravated that they had to wait on a customer.  She rolled her eyes and was clearly very irritated that she had to stop what she was doing to ring up my order. Once it was done, and she was putting my group’s pastries in a bag, I turned to grab some napkins, while I waited on the crew in the back making the breakfast sandwiches I ordered.  When she saw that I had the stack of napkins, she barked loudly for the whole store to hear, “Where did you get those napkins?”  I told her I had gotten them from the napkin holder behind me, and she rolled her eyes again. I asked her why she wanted to know, and she said, “Well we were going to give you some, but never mind…whatever,” and walked off. It was unbelievably offensive and rude, and I won’t be back to that restaurant again, if that lady is behind the counter.
Do not order from here

This location is getting worse and worse. Last week I was charged for extra ingredient on my salad and and didn’t get them on my lunch order and then today same thing for breakfast didn’t get cream cheese in order to eat my bagel after i specifically asked for it. Breakfast ruined and not any time to go back as I am at work and shift started already. Completely wasted money again.
Great Panera! Clean, plenty of outdoor and indoor seating to have good conversations. Coffee seems to often run low in need of refill around 8:00 am though.

Lo que más me gusta de Panera, es que tiene bebidas calientes y diferentes sabores de té caliente, demas de café y lo tradicional que puedas encontrar en un Bakery.  Siempre están actualizando su menú de desayunos.

Sorry to go negative but the pizza didn't have enough cheese, I asked for a large caramel crunch decaf and they gave me a medium regular. They made a new corrected one. They didn't give me a itemized receipt and I was wasn't asked if I wanted it.
The soups we ordered were very good.
Good ambience, good bread but the taste not anywhere near Asian counterpart at least for the Indians
Myself and an older friend went to Panera's in Kingsley for lunch and dined in.The service was exemplary from Leslie & Dan. Sweet, kind, parient, and very welcoming
Great for lunches.

The ⭐️ are for the service. My rapid lane experience appeared slower then normal. I poured  the last of the hazelnut coffee. My order included a cinnamon bagel and smear which took about 10mins to receive. Not so rapid-but,  I will still continue to visit Panera for the same order.
I hope this review helps you out.
That’s how good it is.
Thank you.  Our food was hot and the cold cold.  Driver was great. Delivery time was accurate.  I'll have to order from here again.  Thank you
Always good.

All but one dispenser of coffee was empty at 8.15 AM.  When I asked about if a refill was ready, she just started a new pot.  Wouldn't you start a new pot when you replace one.  This was hazelnut which is probably the number 1 seller.  Four of us were waiting and others walked away because there was no coffee.
Amazing drive thru staff, very friendly and great service.
Great food
Best experience at Panera ever
never answered my calls😔 i just wanted to know if they have a chocolate croissant.🥀💔

Terrible service, no one at the register. No one even came up front to check on customers. Apparently you need to place the order on tablet. The interface of the tablet wasn't intuitive and then the system prompted for a tip.
Grace is the absolute sweetest employee! She is very kind and helpful, her customer service skills are phenomenal!!!!

I’ve done 3 online orders and for some reason my orders never make it to the pick up area or there was a problem with my food. Today my order was sitting up on the counter with no name tag or receipt. I wouldn’t have even considered this review but the last 3 times I ordered food there was an issue.
We love this Panera!!! I have a food allergy and they take excellent care of me every time we go!

Teriyaki and broccoli bowl not worth the price.  Dark meat chicken and regular size bowl is small.  Any other local chinese to go is better.  Staff has not learned that french onion soup without croutons is not french onion soup.  Asking for extra croutons not enough, they still forget to include.  Avoid curbside unless you fully inspect your order before leaving.

Went today, the man at the window was constantly touching his mask by his nose and Pulling it up, looked very worn. Panera provide clean masks or drop this policy as I personally don't like people touching my food and their mask with the same gloves. The store can reply but it won't change anything. 😒
Clean place great atmosphere had to use the kiosk for ordering
I love this place. The best service ever!!!
A great dining experience!!
Soup!!!
My Favorite broccoli cheddar soup and turkey bravo sandwich

grace is the most amazing person ever! i went through the drive through and she was so nice! Customer service was amazing! Even with staffing issues she was postitive and all the food was perfect! She makes me come back! She definitely deserves a raise! Thank you Grace!
Normally pretty busy, but the staff is no rush to get orders out. The food is usually okay though
Have tried multiple times to go... dining room closed at early hours and told to sit in the way too long drive through line. Shouldn't even have a drive through, but here we are. Do better.
Had missing parts of our food multiple times, very understaffed and empty. Food came out and it was cold and did not taste up to par.

I normally have good experiences with Panara Bread. This Panara Bread was not so good however. We decided to use their drive through. There were 2 soups as part of our order - they forgot one. Ordered 2 sweet teas - both were unsweet. We asked if utensils were in the bag and was told they were - they were not. On the plus side, the food is as good as you would expect from Panara.

I was a little disappointed, but that's the norm these days. I had the opportunity to order my meal with a real person and that was new. I was informed that we could eat in the dining room, but the food would be prepared to go... The thing that I don't understand is that when I paid in advance of getting my food or receiving any kind of service, I was expected to leave a tip. I know that times are tough, but the notion of leaving a tip is based on the service you receive, not the service you expect. I felt like I was being guilted into leaving a tip. The food was good - on par with panera's normal offerings.

I ordered a whole salad that looked like a half salad. Some of the lettuce was brown. One salad, one bowl, 2 soups and a Turkey sandwich cost $50. There was no itemized receipt with the order. When I tried calling the store no one picked up the phone, even after several attempts. This has happened previous times. I would not recommend going to this Panera or any Panera as they have gone downhill pretty quickly.
Forgot my sandwich in an online order but made up for it with $15 dollar off voucher

The food is great as usual Panera quality but the service is extremely slow especially on a Sunday. I ordered a salad at 10:10 on the app and it didn’t come out until 1045.  I was actually late for a babysitting client because of it. Some of the people in the back where extremely slow and honestly not hustling even though the queue was very long. A lot of people came back while I was standing there waiting, and complained that their food was cold. I also saw a customer and what seem to be the Director of the back getting into a tussle over a sandwich. I probably won’t be back to this location because of the slow service, but it’s normal Panera quality
Wait time in drive thru is ridiculous every morning. Wait staff have no sense of urgency.

I stop by every morning for my coffee and almond milk. It's quick and easy and fast when the Kiosk is working.
I love their blueberry muffins. They are the best I've ever had, filled with lots of fresh berry's.
Waiting for the order 20 min for few croissants and coffee latte 😭.

My order was incorrect as I arrived at drive through window. After discussing the correct items and while waiting for my corrected order some other female staff not in uniform comes to the drive-through and asked me what drink did I want. I told her it’s on my ticket. She proceeded to tell me that fine, I might just not get one and slammed the window shut. What kind of response is that? She continued to yell, saying all kinds of curse words and talking amongst the staff about me and I could hear every word with the window closed. She was losing it for no reason  senseless. Bad attitude with drive thru current staff workers and even the manager named Jenny call should have proceeded to diffuse the situation when I tried to tell her about my experience but instead escalated it rolling her eyes and neck at me. Not professional at all! I will never visit this location again. They are downright mean hateful especially towards black people.
The staff at the Kingsley location in Ft. Mill are amazing and patient. Love coming here. Especially the staff that helped me last night and this morning.

Very like to go to this location.
Relatively clean, nice spot
The employees are not friendly, they seem unhappy, and are condescending and rude. I already prefer to order at the kiosks.

Mistakes  in nearly every order. On top of it, the attitude of the staff is terrible.  Not going back to this location. Gives Panera a bad name. Also we ordered the cheese and steak sandwich....which in this case should be labeled a little cheese with lots of bread and zero steak. What a joke!
I’ve had bugs in my salad twice. Probably won’t go back to this location.

Mediocre, as expected. First time trying the warm bowl, for some reason there was sour cream on top of warm rice....no one likes that. Brought my friend with me and she asked to sign up for the panera rewards card.  Team member told us she was out of them and to check by the kiosk on our way out...I expected better service than that.
Excelente atención y servicio, ademas de muy buena calidad de comida.

The front people are some of the nicest people I know. Very friendly and always welcoming. Mrs. Lisa always asks how your day is going and always welcomes in my friend and I joyfully. I will continue to go to this location for the environment and food.
It's panera.......

We go to this location since it’s closest to us, but that will stop. Was missing food and when called, they don’t answer. Tried calling for 3 days at the “non-busy” times. They do have times that they prefer calls that are indicated on a recording. Extremely let down, since they have good food and my kids ended up coming home to no food.

First time at this Panera Bread location. Went through the drive through and thankfully the line moved quickly. Tried the Baja Bowl with chicken. Very tasty and filling. Will definitely try the other warm bowls.

Dirty as usual. My husband comes here often and brings me on the weekends. Indoor and outdoor tables are often dirty. Today there was only one clean table inside. There's food on the carpet. The whole time we've been sitting here and finished our meals no one has come to clean the other tables.

The food is good, but I  want to leave as soon as possible. It's never my choice to come here. If it were clean it would be great.
Love the bowls and Strawberry Poppyseed Salad!
Drive thru service is very slow. Take like 10-20 mins to get your order.

Fresh and delicious food!!  Friendly staff..Grace, Mgr., helped resolve changes to our order quickly and was really nice! UPDATE 7/1/21: The salads and fruit are always fresh, and the chicken doesn't have any additives...very tasty! Grace Hervert, Manager, is very efficent and super helpful!👍🙂
Good amazing food!
Nice restaurant with an screened-in outdoor seating area, with a little fireplace.
This place is really nice in the inside, but the patio area is the best for me when the weather is good and nice...!!! ✌
Very friendly staff and good service on a day they were admittedly understaffed.  Manager was in action keeping things moving.
A good place to hang out and the sandwich I ordered is a must try - Chipotle chicken avocado melt 👍👍
Flatbread is A1!

Expensive!!! I used to go to Panera bread but it has gotten so unbelievably expensive. There are so many other place with reasonable prices & just as good or better food. $37 for 2 for lunch & it’s not even a sit down, cloth table kind of restaurant. Crazy!
I love to eat here. Good for a healthy lunch

Food looks and tastes processed. Great if you have allergies to salt n pepper, and flavor!
Pricey too, which I don't understand.
Great French onion soup
Panera bread is the best. High prices but they pay their employees well, basically the Starbucks of sandwich/soup shops. It's hard to complain about any location.
Buena atención y comida.  Bonita la sede.
Nice place to eat. I like the layout of the place. Has a fireplace, nice.
Cinnamon bagels...yum
great
The food is expensive the portions are small & the staff is rather abruptly rude .. 🤔
Food was great....service was not!!
My chocolate was cool
Great breakfast menu!!
Nice place for lunch.  But that Flatbread pizza not worth $9.  And it gets cold ready fast.  I wouldn't order it again.

Always clean with solid service levels. Managers are attentive. Seems to be thriving despite covid.

Also, take advantage of the Kinsley duck pond. Get your lunch and cross the street to enjoy the pond view.
This panera is very nice I just find their food over all very meh...
Too small, no social distance.. the coffee machines are inside the counter.

I like this location and a very good place to go. But I feel like prices are way too high also the seat was not cleaned. I don’t understand how this is a large Mac and cheese there’s not enough at all.

out if focasia bread
out of large cups
I tried the pizza for lunch for the first time and I really enjoyed it!

I placed curb-side bagel pick up order and forgot to add slice & toast option. So I called on the phone and requested it to be sliced and toasted and lady on the phone said no problem we will do it but when I got to pick up, it was not done and I asked the person who brought the order out to see if they can take back and slice and toast for us. She immediately said no we cannot take back to the store. There was not even a minor consideration to fix the issue here. If you can’t adjust the order on the phone why not say as no we can’t do that after order is placed? Where is the customer service aspect here? My order number is 515578476

Ms Grace Hebert was rude and disrespectful. I spoke with a kind gentleman that handled the first issue of discrimination and I was promised that the staff would be trained but clearly that was just something to say. Continued discrimination against people with disabilities will not be tolerated nor will the violation of federally protected consumer rights.
Love the egg souffles.  Caramel latte was yummy too!!
Food came out fast and the staff is always great
Employees were friendly and very helpful
Wasn't all that great. They gave me 2 pieces of cheese on dry sourdough bread for a grilled cheese. Not very pleasant.  The crust was the best part.

Wow. Very rude customer service. I am unable to wear a mask due to health reasons. Manager insisted I put it on anyway to order food for two year old daughter. After I humbly complied with her harsh orders, she also insisted that mask must completely cover nose up to my eyes.
Despite my health condition that she had absolutely no regard for, she just demanding that I submit to her unreasonable demands.
So my prsonal health is irrelevant to mask police at Paneras?
Maybe they should Google new Danish mask study about effectiveness??
The wax paper smelled like chemicals. 😝
Wouldn't take gift card. Gave me customer service #.  Stayed on hold 30 minutes before I had to hang up. If they are that busy with gift cards issues, must be a big problem.
Staff is great and super kind. Super apologetic when they run out of something or make a mistake.
This Panera does not wash  lettuce apparently. So disgusted with the salad that had dirt in it! Never coming back here.
Always delicious. Never had a bad meal here
Fastest drive thru ever! The girl that took our order was super friendly and patient with my rowdy crew. The guy that gave us the order was also very friendly. Very professional staff!
Great service
Seems they should stay closed. Basically it was a challenge to get what we wanted. I would advise them to close their doors until they get it together.
Los desayunos bien, el pan exelente pero la verdad el cafe frio y una señora ya mañor le dijo ala cajera, q el cafe estaba frio, y ella fue grosera y ledijo pues calientelo usted, mmm mal

I LOVE Panera, but I had an allergic reaction to something in that sw chili lime salad. I have never had a problem there before, and there wasn't anything in the salad ingredients I was allergic to, so I am guessing it was something in the prep methods or practices.
Top notch coffee and food. Lines are usually long. Tip them well.

Update Aug 2020: They started to mess up pick up order again. Ordered BBQ sandwich with pulled chicken and it was just chunks of chicken without any frizzled onions. Worst BBQ sandwich ever made. Manager was nice enough to provide refund but that won’t justify a super bad sandwich.

Update Feb 2019: they have improved a lot. Very consistent with the orders and they did it very well every time too. Truly impressed and what a come back.

One year back (early 2018): They will mess up your pickup order more often than you think. Today, they made a Chicken Frontage without tomato and onions. I mean, seriously?? Thanks for messing up my son's dinner!!! Just added a star extra since manager was able to provide refund.
Always good food and service!
Friendly service. Only concern was I ordered 2 bagels of the same kind and they didn't have it.
This has got to be the worst Panera I have ever been to. EVERY single time we go to this location they are out of something, and make my order wrong. Literally every single time!

They are doing a great job at making sure people are wearing masks, physically distancing, and sanitizing frequently. They didnt put croutons on the soups and gave my husband bread instead of chips but the food still tasted good.
Great bread!
Free coffee subscription for iced Hazelnut coffee and I ordered chicken chipotle avocado sandwich.

The cashier lady at the window was very non chalant when I expressed my concerns regarding my order. To make matters worst we are going through a pandemic, she handed me my order with her bare hands. Like why are you not wearing gloves.
Attended wedding rehearsal dinner here.  Nice place.

Panera Bread is fine. This one's in a good location and has a drive through, so that's nice. Clean with lots of seating, but seating for more than two is limited. Standard fare, which is full of good choices. Be as healthy or decadent as you like.
The food is healthy and delicious and the employees are always respectful and nice!
The best Panera I've been to!  Very clean, nice fireplace
Very nice location and friendly staff!
Some Panera locations are far better than others. This is one of the good ones.
Too Expensive
I like this location. We've had a couple of minor issues with our food but management was quick to make it right.

I have gone to different paneras through out the US. Order the same order everyday and came here asked for a yogurt no blueberry’s and told me they couldnt make it. Told them i could show them receipts from other places. Didnt even bother to look at them. Staff needs to be better trained.
Great coffee, love the soup & half sandwich

Panera in Fort Mill at Kingsley is an amazing place. I ordered delivery and left instructions to leave it on the porch since there was sickness in the house. They not only did that, they sent along two bowls of chicken noodle soup and a note to “feel better” for free. What an amazing customer experience. Thank you Kingsley Panera

I waited over 15 minutes for s cup of coffee that I never received.  One person at register for the breakfast traffic and then all coffee was empty.   When I brought to their attention that coffee was empty I was told that it would be out immediately but When it didn’t come out I was advised they had to brew it. Got my money back. I will continue to be a Starbucks customer which is a few stores away.
Always the great menu selection, plus this one is in a cool mall

My sandwich came out with lettuce even though I told the cashier spinach instead, my soup was not hot warm at best.  The place was clean over all. The area where it is located is a pain in the butt to get around. Very tight.

I am 100% done with this Panera.  For about 2 months now, every time I order their reduced fat cream cheese (The small personal sized containers), it has been moldy.  I have called twice about this, and both times I am under the impression that this is brand new information to them.  I stopped going there for about a month to let that cream cheese rotate out of their store.  Went this morning...moldy cream cheese again.  Unbelievable.  No use in calling.  I am guessing their coolers are not cold enough.

Delicious lunch! There was an issue with my wife's order, I brought it back in and the manager came out personally to apologize for the mix-up, brought out a new meal, and gave us a voucher for a future meal for the mix-up. Everything was delicious!
The food here is always good!  We had the Modern Greek Salad with Quinoa, and a half Turkey-Avacado-BLT sandwich with a cup of Broccoli Cheese Soup.  Yum!!
Just had a new dish and it was wonderful! The BBQ mac'n cheese was delicious! Paired that with tomato soup for the Pick 2.
I love Panera, if I don't order online for delivery I go on over and eat outside. Their food is phenomenal!!
The manager, Kaiden was great when there was a oversight in my to-go order. Thanks for making this right.
Can't beat the Pick 2... Turkey Bacon Bravo and some Hearty Classic Broccoli Cheddar Soup!
Great service and clean facilities
Love this Place, they are always busy so its best to order in the app ahead so you dont get stuck in the line. The manager is caring and the place is nice and tidy
Great food
Panera bread is always good. pricey but good

I absolutely love this place! I never leave reviews but this drive thru is so efficient and convenient that’s i decided i have to give them 5 stars. The people in the widow are always so friendly and fast moving, they deserve a raise!
New grain bowl was delicious
Good food - wonderful autumn squash soup. Hate the congested parking lot and too small parking spaces and streets.

Clean and well air conditioned with free fast WiFi.  The food and drink options are really good.  Handicap accessible, just park in the lot  and use the entrance closest to the lot.  Their table service is great too.  Another good reason to stop here, especially if your handicap.  The food is always good here.

Trevor from the BOH made my visit above and beyond expectations. After sharing my love for macaroni and cheese with him and my desire to try something new, he suggested I try it with these crispy tortilla strips and a 4 cheese blend with buffalo sauce on the side. After assisting the cashier (Nancy,  also an amazing employee who signed us up for rewards) with ringing in the order properly, he brought our food to the table himself! It was absolutely the best mac and cheese I've ever had and I ended up pouring the entire side ramakin of sauce over the bowl. By going the extra mile to make my experience special, he has gaurunteed my return business (even though there are 2 locations closer to my residence ) I will be ordering my macaroni this way whenever possible. SUPERB CUSTOMER SERVICE! 5/5 -coming back soon
This is a lively joint that is very well laid out.  They have a great screened in patio as well.  What makes this one special.  There is a fire place in it.
Cost doesn't match quantity
The food is amazing..I really like the coffee cake..I purchase a whole cake for my coworkers for breakfast 😉

We like the outside seating and the food from the bakery portion. However, in typical Panera fashion you don't get what you pay for with food. I ordered the Southwest chicken breakfast wrap. It only had one thin strip of chicken in it. Practically all wrap and no substance. That was the case for everyone in our party that morning. No matter what anyone ordered, barely any meat on their sandwiches. If Panera could fix that, this place is an easy 4-5 stars.

Clean and nice inside.  What I expect from a Panera bread.  Food is good with reasonable prices too.  Nice fast causal environment with plenty of parking close to their building with a drive through too!  Probably best place in Kingsley’s really to jump in for a good meal

They got my order correct!!...This is a big deal at any Panera...The Greek Salad was perfect as was the sandwich. The cashier was very knowledgeable. The food came out quickly. I really think this is a we'll run Panera.
Fuji apple chicken salad ❣
Fresh and tasty food, good selection of salads, soups and sandwiches
I love Panera Bread!
Great ambience
Great coffee
Best Panera food experience I've ever had.
Great service & clean food
Best Panera because of neat screened in porch eating area
Love it as always... great food, wider options and reasonable prices.
Sugar on everything. It will trigger your beetes
Did not give me my Panera rewards on my order. Disappointing.

Very fancy Panera located in giant outdoor shopping center. Has shaded outdoor area with fans and then typical outdoor patio. Offers the quick order option but they were all down. Front area where orders happen gets very crowded- there's a line to order, coffee bar, and the drink bar all in one area.

Restaurant is clean and accomodating.  Mix of indoor and outdoor seating.  Parking can be a little challenging.  Food is consistently of a high quality and service is good.  Only complaint on my last visit was a number of the self service kiosks were not operational, but it was slow so staff was available and eager to assist.
Great coffee and bagels . Nice outside fireplace .

Tried to order multiple items from their plant based offering only to be told none where available. How can entire sections of the menu not be available? Not many good places in the area for this and Panera just got moved off the list. Then what we did order came out all wrong.

I’m so sick of this Panera constantly leaving items off my order. Today it was a chocolate chip cookie that I paid for and was really looking forward to. I haven’t had any other problems here, but this has been a consistent issue.

reviews_data.review_text: We always stop at Panera when we are in the area. Shout out to Douglas who surprised my husband with a birthday treat,so sweet of you.

We used to order the smokehouse sandwich all the time but this time the meat was very slim and had no onions. The amount of money they charge for their food they could at least make it right. This used to be my son's favorite sandwich and he even let me know not to go back.
Food is fresh and Ontime.

reviews_data.review_text:
I had an overall good experience at this Panera Bread location in Kingsley Town Center. The staff was friendly, the restaurant was clean, and my food came out fresh and exactly as ordered.

The only downside is that the location itself is a bit hard to find, especially if you’re not familiar with the area. Navigating the parking lot can also be a little confusing at first. Once you figure it out, though, it’s definitely worth the visit.

Overall, a solid experience, and I would come back again.
Great location. Quick service. Clean dining area. Very modern.

Came to study, got pick 2 menu.  Often do that at Paneras. This location is new to me, but I will be back, as we moved closeby. Enjoyed my food and time here.
Amanda is awesome!!!!! So pleasant, friendly,  fast, caring.  She was at the register and cleaning and greeting and saying byes to people and giving helful hints (like warm up sweet treat in microwave, showed were it was, and helped). Thank you,  Amanda,  you made my afternoon))))

We have enjoyed Panera for years. This visit was horrible!! On a Friday evening in Kingsley,7:30pm, the drink station was already torn down for cleaning! Then the French onion soup was cold. When it was taken back, the kid in the kitchen told us that there was a microwave out on the floor!! What?!? We go out to eat and get told to warm up our own food that was supposed to come out hot!?! I then took it to the front counter and said it was unacceptable and they said they’d make it right, and again it came out cold!! Unacceptable!! FINALLY on the 3rd try they finally got it hot! But by the time we got the soup hot, our hot sandwiches were cold!!! The worst experience ever at a Panera!! Do better next time!! Although it will have to be with someone else. I won’t be coming back to this location to “use the microwave out on the floor” myself!!

reviews_data.review_text:
Food was nothing special. My husband always says there isn’t enough meat on his sandwich. We stopped by after a basketball game and it was $40 for 3 of us. My bagel was good and fresh, but nothing special.
The seating was horrible.. there were 2 areas of seating where there were a lot of people taking up space that resulted in less seating for anyone who was there with more than 2 people.
This place is amazing! Phoenix is always so sweet and helpful. Amanda is also super fantastical! They have a great team running things as they always do such a great job all around!
Hummmm

The full size soups got 1/2 bowl . I asked her to add bit more soups she said now .
Thsi place can benefit from more cleaning zzz that carpet stinks

Normally I have no issues with Panera, but I was disappointed  this time. I ordered the pick 2; mac and cheese and the French ciabatta dipper. I've attached a pic of my sandwich. There was barely anything on it.  And the au jus was French onion soup, so that sucked. It was pretty much having a cup of French onion soup and dipping only bread in it. Hopefully things will be better next time. Definitely wasn't worth almost $16.00.

The way the package the bagels and pastry is simply gross. They stick in coupons and receipts in the bag. Customer service in drive through is lacking. They never know which bag belongs to who. It’s simply a disaster and I was a Panera lover but they have simply made me never want to go there.

I’d like to give a special shout out to Amanda who took excellent care of me this morning. She was polite, kind, warm, and charming. She had fresh coffee brewed and it was hot, everything was stocked and the bakery was full and plentiful. I hope she is truly appreciated as she is a hidden gem and you don’t find people like her often. Some Paneras I’ve been to with kiosk, you don’t get greeted or acknowledged and it’s not a good feeling when you go into a place to spend money. At this Panera, Ms. Amanda is the best and we had a lovely chat and she really brightened my day, &  made my morning 5x better.

Used the app for a Rapid Pick-Up and my order was ready exactly when it said it would be. Everything was packaged correctly and the food was fresh. Definitely my go-to Panera in the area for a quick, hassle-free lunch.

Ordered on kiosk and was told on the pick two could not take to the onions off so want me to pay like 14 bucks in think instead of 7 over onions like no reason why can't take something off I won't go back to this location other stores don't give me issues like really did not add or change anything then I could see ordering the higher price one maybe someone needs to contact a lawyer to find a change
I was just in for a pick up order but they made sure my food was ready and told me where to find everything that I needed. The staff was very friendly and polite.
Rotten food served. Just opened this up at my office. Gross.
Always great food and smiling faces!
Carmen and Erika were so rude to me when I asked for my sandwich to be fixed. They had so much attitude and I will not be coming back

I am pasting the same picture from another review because I had an issue with these same individuals. Erika yelled at me and bucked for asking for napkins - completely unprofessional and unwarranted. Who hires these types of people and keeps them employed when they are clearly ruining the entire establishment and making it an unsafe environment for everyone around. There are already accusations of racism and aggression from so many others. Carmen as well is beyond uncivil insolent. They have no home-training and are offensive to customers. This panera and it's manager are not doing their job and need to be placed elsewhere

Carmen and Erika are extremely combative and rude. Beware of these individuals making your food. My sandwich was made wrong so I kindly asked if I could get it remedied and was immediately met with a bad attitude and defensiveness from Cameron. Then Erika chimed in and was rudely told me i was wrong and they were right. I felt bullied and dogpiled on for no reason. I finally got it remade but couldnt even trust that they didnt do anything to my food, so ive also wasted money on an establishment that mistreats their customers. I've noticed them be rude to other customers in the past and now I know that this is their regular customer service. No accountability or simple empathy from these two. It is just food, mistakes happen and I understand that employees go through so many things - I am in food service myself. That's why I remained kind, but these two are not qualified to serve the public and handle anything that people are going to ingest. Management is not doing their job by keeping these two around, especially after so many complaints against Erika.
My sandwich had 3 slices of turkey, 2 slices of bacon, and half a a slice of cheese spread across a whole sandwich. Terrible, not worth the money. Soup was good
Always a great place to be for good nutrition, business and smiles
I ordered a sandwich that looked like it was going to be stuffed with meat.This is what I ended up with
I come in if want to got alot ppl boy call me on private number again watch witch car you drive dont know me at all boy

I like this place for being clean cosy and having great coffee and nice people working there. My kids love it for cookies and muffins.
We've been in this location so many times and it has been consistently awesome. Everything is just perfect.

Very rude manager! Argued with me about the order my 85 year old father made. They charged he and my mother over $45 for lunch and then questioned me as to why i didn’t say something! I was saying something! I was so disrespected that I told her Nevermind and went back to our table. She never came over to make restitution ! Poor customer service! Not to mention food on the floors and tabletops no cleaned off. Just really disappointed!

My daughter and I ordered lunch through the drive-through during a busy, frantic week and Amanda treated us so well. I have never had better customer service—she sincerely asked about our day, was genuinely friendly, and threw in an extra treat that had broken and was no longer sellable. Our encounter with her was such a bright spot and pick-me-up in our day and made us want to return.

reviews_data.review_text: We visited this location recently. We were served by Amanda. She was so pleasant and helpful, I felt compelled to leave her some kudos here!

Arrived around 11:30 and ordered a drink just for the man at the pickup window to hand me someone else’s drink. The drink was ordered over an hour before I arrived and was watered down from the ice melting. Extremely disappointed at the laziness shown by the worker!

I ordered a sandwich for rapid pickup through the app. I realized i forgot to take onions and tomatoes off, and couldn’t edit my order as i had already placed it. I called the store and asked if they could modify it for me and they did! Even though they were pretty busy. Incredible service. Thanks Panera staff at Kingsley!

Poor portion size of Mac N’ Cheese. Didn’t know that there is now an option to pick between a cup or bowl size. When my food was done, I looked down at the Mac n’ cheese and was disappointed by the portion. Went back up to the counter and explained my disappointment, the staff members didn’t say anything. Just looked at me like I was stupid. Will not be returning.

Where can I start!  Wow Riley was so amazing I asked for a light roast and well they were out!  She went out of her way to Brew it for me!  She was absolutely awesome did it with a smile and just made my day because MAN it was gonna be a rough one if I didn’t have it!  So Thank You again Riley for taking care of me and that store!

Another mixed up order yesterday. With the price we spend be more careful. There is zero way to get a credit which isn't cool. The tuna is delicious that's why I keep coming. The sandwich ordered for my son was messed up though which makes me want to stop coming.

Ridiculously rude and unprofessional kitchen help. Nobody acknowledged me and the pick up order sits there away from everyone else’s pick up orders. All orders’ names were called out but that one and after waiting 6-7 minutes finally ask if that’s my order. The lady rudely asks “what’s the name?” And never did this with anyone else’s order that got put on the counter. We will take our business elsewhere.
Have the drink plan it good for a lot of different things also sometimes get a pastry for 2 bucks but price doesn't go down till hit check out I think it should show before then when in the cart

I arrived after driving 12 miles 4 minutes after opening at 7:04 and they were already out of soufflés.  How this place stays In business I will never know. The manager was nice but this place is utterly incompetent. Maybe they should figure out how to actually make food and they will sell more.  Walked out and will never be back.
this is a new Panera, and the design and furnishings are efficient and uninviting. I don't like sitting in a chair where my feet dangle. or sitting at a long bank of tables. uninviting
Had a nice sandwich and salad. Expensive when you consider you order at a counter, pick up your food at a window and required to put your plates away. But they still ask for a tip when ordering.

review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Dietary restrictions, Parking, Kid-friendliness

reviews_data.review_text: My favorite place to bring kids here.

My order has been wrong EVERY SINGLE TIME!! This time there wasn’t a pickle. Through the drive thru I explained that an item is always missing from my orders and asked if they had included a pickle. Her response: “There should be.” So I checked AND there wasn’t. So I requested one and the employee brought me one right away. It WAS SPOILED! Never again. Stay away!  Between the bad attitude and the rotten food, disgusting! You’d do better at Chik-Fil-A up the road!!! I’ll keep my money from now on. Good luck Fort Mill Panera with your current business plan of: Running Customers Away. Please let me know when you reach pandemic levels of business so I can CELEBRATE!!! Good riddance!
Gotta Love some good food! My favorite is the turkey sandwich dipped in some broccoli soup! Yummy for my tummy
Una buena opción para los amantes de los sandwiches, ingredientes y vegetales frescos, ambiente agradable y la atención muy rápido, todo el personal es muy amable.
The food was delicious. I like it because it's natural with no antibiotics!

Food never disappoints, regardless if it’s take out or dine in. While the food is ridiculously priced, it tastes pretty darn good and hits the spot. Location is usually pretty clean and is large with a bunch of seating for everyone. My favorite is the fontega chicken sandwhich. A little bit disappointed that the charged lemonades left the menu.

We stopped for lunch. Two people had the squash soup and said it was excellent. Two had 1/2 sandwiches and Mac and cheese, also good. I had the chili which was notably lacking in flavor and spiciness until I added hot sauce. Then it was spicy enough, but the flavor was still meh.
Nice location with wonderful staff.  Very polite gentleman working at this time at the cashier. Wonderful atmosphere!! I will visit again.
Can’t get a simple order correct and they don’t seem to care.

This is the second time in a month that I've received the half size salad for the full size. Either it's a training thing or a margin thing. But now that this has happened twice, at this price, I will think twice about picking up lunch at Panera.
High price, low value

This location in my opinion has been headed in the wrong direction. Past few meals have not been very good at all. Me and my family went in one time to order and were ignored for 10 minutes so we got the hint and just left.
As a Panara always is.

review_questions.Vegetarian offerings: Large vegetarian selection, Clearly labeled vegetarian dishes

reviews_data.review_text: Always the best  this place kept me alive during the pandemic. During lockdown they came and delivered. Simply the Best Panera.

I ordered dinner for three for delivery yesterday, 6/15/24. When it arrived one of the sandwiches for the order was missing. I called the store directly and the manager on duty, Ted or Teddy (I'm so sorry I don't remember exactly) went way above and beyond to make sure the issue was resolved. He even kept in touch with me the whole time, so I knew how long it would be for the item to arrive. Once it was done, and she was putting my group’s pastries in a bag, I turned to grab some napkins, while I waited on the crew in the back making the breakfast sandwiches I ordered.
